{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/63083086?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/brodmart", "id": 63083086, "login": "brodmart", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjYzMDgzMDg2", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44022", "cvss": {"score": 5.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "### Impact
The LaTeX backend's handling of `\includegraphics`, `\input`, and `\include` commands lacked path containment validation. Attackers could craft malicious LaTeX documents with path traversal sequences (e.g., `../../../etc/passwd`) to:
- Read arbitrary files from the file system accessible to the process
- Include sensitive files in the converted document output
- Potentially access configuration files, credentials, or other sensitive data

### Patches
Fixed in version 2.91.0. The fix implements strict path validation using `Path.resolve().is_relative_to()` to ensure all resolved paths remain within the base document directory. Attempts to traverse outside the base directory are logged and blocked.

### Workarounds
Avoid processing untrusted LaTeX documents. If processing is necessary, run in a sandboxed environment with restricted file system access.

### References
- Fix release: [v2.91.0](https://github.com/docling-project/docling/releases/tag/v2.91.0)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00163, "percentile": 0.05853}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2j5p-7p5m-cvqr", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-03T21:14:35Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2j5p-7p5m-cvqr", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2j5p-7p5m-cvqr"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44022"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-03T21:14:35Z", "references": ["https://github.com/docling-project/docling/security/advisories/GHSA-2j5p-7p5m-cvqr", "https://github.com/docling-project/docling/releases/tag/v2.91.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2j5p-7p5m-cvqr"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/docling-project/docling/security-advisories/GHSA-2j5p-7p5m-cvqr", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/docling-project/docling", "summary": "Docling: Potential Path Traversal via LaTeX \includegraphics and \input Commands", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-03T21:14:35Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2j5p-7p5m-cvqr", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.91.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "docling"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.73.0, < 2.91.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Docling: Potential Path Traversal via LaTeX \includegraphics and \input Commands
